prompt: Create a schema for the attorney review request form. Fields: client_id required, order_id required, notes optional, urgency (one of: standard, urgent), and the user must check an acknowledgment box.

assertions.text: acknowledgment_signed is the LAST field in the schema
assertions.check: acknowledgment_signed appears after urgency in the object

assertions.text: Acknowledgment message matches codebase: 'You must sign the acknowledgment before proceeding'
assertions.check: grep 'You must sign the acknowledgment before proceeding' schema_addition.ts
